reviews.review_title: great graphics, easy to play, feels real
reviews.review_description: great graphics, easy to play, feels real

I downloaded the game and was blown away.  So real. I played the computer and found that to be very cool, but being able to play other people in the game is beyond amazing. I won my first game, but lost my second,  then I had to leave  (ran out of power). I just love being able to play pool in my kitchen . It would be nice though if we could also talk to each other as we play. Just use Google Translate if you are playing someone from another country.
Best best pool game ever !! Must try
Amazing game can't lie can't wait for the full game to come out get it along ASAP ill be waiting
Super realistic 👍🏻
Love this game. like having a real pool table in your house, and you can rotate it to get shots played. worth a download.

reviews.review_title: Superb game, cannot wait for full game!!
reviews.review_description: If you want a pool game with amazing physics this is the game for you. The fact I can play in mixed reality is great! Honestly feels like you are playing pool. Cannot wait for the full game to be released and to try the challenges, will be purchasing regardless of price. 100/100!!!

I really love it. This alone is worth to have a Quest 3.
Would be great to have also a carambol table without pockets and only three balls to play french billiard, and a colour option for a green table which is much more common.
This is an amazing projection of pocket balls for VR. It has nice visuality and accurate physics.
Was a good game really enjoyed playing. Cannot wait till the resident comes out five stars excellent game.

I don't have enough good things to say about this game. The gameplay is smooth and intuitive, the physics feel really good on the table, down to realistic ball control.

I havnt done online multiplayer, but playing private multiplayer with my gf has been a blast.

If I was to make any suggestions for improvement they would be this:

Take the small/large table button off of the edge of the table and put it in settings, it's too easy to accidentally bump it.

Allow for the front hand to have variable positioning on the stick. Being locked in the same place every shot feels weird.

If possible an additional setting that doesn't lock your cue into it's shooting position as you pull the trigger, I'd love to be punished for having bad form. I feel like this would put this game over the top in immersion and it's already incredible.

For a free pool game DO NOT SLEEP ON THIS.

Can't wait to see more of the unlockables come out. Thank you guys for an awesome game.

I don't have enough space available in my room but the table movement with those handles is perfect for my case. Nicely done!
It looks really good with the Quest 3! The physics are well implemented and it feels like in the real world.
Only thing I'm missing is some sort of chilling background music - and a few different styles for the tables.

This is by far my favorite app on my Quest 3. The immersive nature of it using the passthrough is next level. It seriously feels like I have my very own pool table right in my living room. I'm so excited to see the evolution of this app and what cool things are to come. Their team seems to be off to an amazing start.

It is a great pool. I played snooker a lot, and this one looks amazing! Everything looks pretty real! A cool option is the practice mode. I tried multiplayer. It is awesome! This was a really cool party! I am fascinated! Thanks a lot to the dev team! You do a great job! As a tester, I have only one comment - it is a cool option to turn the table with the handles. But, it would be cool if you could add the option to fix the table height. If you turn the table manually, it's always possible to change the height. And the next one, if it's possible, it would be cool to have an option to turn the table slightly. Like, you can add this option to the left joystick. Totally, it is a great game. I will keep playing it and will buy it when you release it. Thanks again!

Really nice game. Few things that could be improved though:
- sound design: the timing of the sounds is off and the sound is not directional.
- the table moves in between turns sometimes.
- I wish the action of ‘locking’ your aim could be turned off. Sure, it makes it easier to aim but it makes the experience unrealistic and breaks the immersion

This game is what gets me excited for the future of mixed reality and VR in general, the best physics of any game I’ve ever tried…the game feels so real real that you forget about it after a while.. totally immersed in this game, hopefully we can have tournaments in the future.. right now the multiplayer has high wait time for me playing from India, but that’s my only quirk.. 

Hoping for bigger snooker tables in the future. Total support the devs, will buy this game first day of release 

Highly recommend! Add me in if you wanna play sometime.

My first dabble in AR and it’s everything I would have wanted and more. Maybe with time tournaments. Diff colour felt/balls/cues. Ability to mute people haha. 

Just suggestions- game is great without that stuff.
This is an amazing game I love it
this is the best game  I have ever had so far since I got my meta quest 3 2 days ago. It's simply amazing and looks realistic. Please add more features and take my money 🙂
Using Meta Quest 3 controllers and I was unable to execute hand grips to move the table as required to operate the game. Perhaps the app isn't upgraded for use with the Quest 3.

developer_response.body:
hey Draytonis,
the app is designed for Quest3 and grabbing is working. you have to use the grab button on your controller. if you dont know which is grab button we can help you in our growing discord channel here:
https://discord.gg/Mz3Cnrk6Xh

hope you will success and change your rate/review because it doesnt reflect reality
